BACKUP.TITLE: Backup & Restore
BACKUP.DESCRIPTION: Securely manage your app data locally. Backup your data to a file and restore it whenever needed.
BACKUP.EXPORT_SUBTITLE: Download your data as a JSON file
BACKUP.EXPORT_INFO: When you export your data, a single JSON file will be downloaded to your device containing all your transactions, categories, accounts, and settings.
BACKUP.IMPORT_SUBTITLE: Upload a previously exported backup file
BACKUP.CHOOSE_FILE: Click or drag backup file here (.json)
BACKUP.IMPORT_WARNING: Replacing will permanently delete all current data before restoring.
BACKUP.IMPORT_SUCCESS: Data restored successfully. App will now reload.
BACKUP.INVALID_FILE_TYPE: Please select a valid JSON backup file
BACKUP.SECURITY_NOTE: Your data never leaves your device. All backup and restore operations are performed locally.
BACKUP.CONFIRM_REPLACE_MSG: This will PERMANENTLY DELETE all your current transactions, accounts, and settings and replace them with the data from the backup. Are you sure?
BACKUP.CONFIRM_MERGE_MSG: This will add data from the backup to your current data. Duplicate items will be updated. Are you sure?

LANDING.HERO_SUBTITLE: Easily track spending, set budgets, and grow your savings with our intuitive money management tools.
LANDING.FEATURES_SUBTITLE: Everything you need to take control of your financial life, all in one place.
LANDING.HOW_WORKS_SUBTITLE: Start your journey to financial freedom in just a few minutes.
LANDING.ACCESS_SUBTITLE: Manage your finances from your laptop, tablet, or mobile phone. Our responsive design ensures a seamless experience across all your devices, so you can track expenses on the go or analyze your budget at home.

FEATURES_LIST.CONNECT_BANK_DESC: Securely connect your bank accounts for automatic transaction tracking and real-time balance updates.
FEATURES_LIST.SMART_BUDGETING_DESC: Create and manage budgets with intelligent spending alerts to keep you on track.
FEATURES_LIST.SUB_CATEGORY_DESC: Create and manage sub categories to track your spending.
FEATURES_LIST.REAL_TIME_INSIGHTS_DESC: Get instant financial insights and trends with beautiful charts and analytics.
FEATURES_LIST.GOAL_TRACKING_DESC: Set savings goals and track your progress with visual milestones.
FEATURES_LIST.OFFLINE_ACCESS_DESC: Access your data anytime, even without an internet connection.
FEATURES_LIST.MULTIPLE_CURRENCY_DESC: Manage your finances in multiple currencies with ease.
FEATURES_LIST.PWA_DESC: Access your data on multiple devices web, android and ios
FEATURES_LIST.SECURE_PRIVATE_DESC: Your financial data is protected with industry-standard security measures.
FEATURES_LIST.CLOUD_SYNC_DESC: Sync your data across all your devices with ease.

HOW_IT_WORKS_STEPS.STEP_1_DESC: Get the app from App Store or Play Store and create your account in seconds.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEPS.STEP_2_DESC: Define your financial goals and create personalized budgets.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEPS.STEP_3_DESC: Monitor your progress and watch your savings grow with smart insights.

SCREENSHOTS.DASHBOARD_DESC: Get a complete view of your finances at a glance
SCREENSHOTS.ANALYTICS_DESC: Beautiful charts and insights to understand your spending
SCREENSHOTS.GOALS_DESC: Set and track your financial goals with visual progress

TERMS.TITLE: Terms & Conditions
TERMS.INTRODUCTION_TEXT_1: Welcome to Money Manager. These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of our money management application and services. By accessing or using our application, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
TERMS.INTRODUCTION_TEXT_2: If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you may not access or use our application.
TERMS.ACCEPTANCE_TEXT_1: By creating an account, downloading, installing, or using the Money Manager application, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
TERMS.ACCEPTANCE_TEXT_2: These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Money Manager regarding your use of our services.
TERMS.DESCRIPTION_TEXT_1: Money Manager is a personal finance management application that allows users to:
TERMS.DESCRIPTION_LIST_3: Set financial goals and monitor progress
TERMS.DESCRIPTION_TEXT_2: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our service at any time with reasonable notice.

TERMS.ACCOUNTS_LIST_1: You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account
TERMS.ACCOUNTS_LIST_2: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
TERMS.ACCOUNTS_LIST_3: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account
TERMS.ACCOUNTS_LIST_4: You may not share your account credentials with others
TERMS.ACCOUNTS_LIST_5: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your device
TERMS.USE_TEXT_1: You agree to use our application only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to:
TERMS.USE_LIST_1: Use the service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
TERMS.USE_LIST_2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts
TERMS.USE_LIST_3: Interfere with or disrupt the service or servers
TERMS.USE_LIST_4: Upload or transmit viruses, malware, or other harmful code
TERMS.USE_LIST_5: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
TERMS.USE_LIST_6: Use the service to store or transmit illegal content
TERMS.USE_LIST_7: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the application
TERMS.FINANCIAL_TEXT_1: You are responsible for the accuracy and completeness of all financial information you enter into the application. We are not responsible for any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in your financial data.
TERMS.FINANCIAL_TEXT_2: Money Manager is a financial tracking tool and does not provide financial advice, investment recommendations, or tax advice. You should consult with qualified professionals for financial, investment, or tax advice.
TERMS.FINANCIAL_TEXT_3: Our application may integrate with third-party financial institutions or services. We are not responsible for the accuracy, availability, or security of these third-party services.
TERMS.PRIVACY_TEXT_1: Your privacy is important to us. Our collection and use of your personal information is governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference.
TERMS.PRIVACY_TEXT_2: By using our service, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described in our Privacy Policy.
TERMS.SUBSCRIPTION_TEXT_1: We offer both free and premium subscription plans. Premium features require a paid subscription. Subscription fees are billed in advance and are non-refundable except as required by law.
TERMS.SUBSCRIPTION_LIST_1: All fees are exclusive of applicable taxes
TERMS.SUBSCRIPTION_LIST_3: You may cancel your subscription at any time
TERMS.SUBSCRIPTION_LIST_4: No refunds for partial months or unused periods
TERMS.SUBSCRIPTION_LIST_5: We may change subscription fees with 30 days' notice

TERMS.IP_TEXT_2: You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our application without our written permission.
TERMS.IP_TEXT_3: You retain ownership of your financial data and content, but grant us a license to use it to provide our services.

TERMS.LIABILITY_LIST_1: Loss of profits, data, or use

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.INTRODUCTION_TEXT_1: Money Manager ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our money management application.
PRIVACY.INTRODUCTION_TEXT_2: By using our application, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
PRIVACY.COLLECT_LIST_1: Name and email address when you create an account
PRIVACY.COLLECT_LIST_2: Profile information you choose to provide
PRIVACY.COLLECT_LIST_3: Financial data you input (transactions, budgets, goals)
PRIVACY.COLLECT_LIST_5: App usage patterns and features accessed
PRIVACY.COLLECT_LIST_7: IP address and general location data
PRIVACY.USE_LIST_1: Provide and maintain our money management services
PRIVACY.USE_LIST_2: Process your transactions and financial data
PRIVACY.USE_LIST_3: Generate reports and insights about your finances
PRIVACY.USE_LIST_4: Improve our application and user experience
PRIVACY.USE_LIST_6: Provide customer support and respond to inquiries
PRIVACY.STORAGE_TEXT_1: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal and financial information:
PRIVACY.STORAGE_LIST_2: Secure cloud storage with regular backups
PRIVACY.STORAGE_LIST_5: Limited access to personal data by authorized personnel only
PRIVACY.STORAGE_TEXT_2: Your data is stored securely and we never share your financial information with third parties without your explicit consent.
PRIVACY.SHARING_TEXT_1: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
PRIVACY.SHARING_LIST_3: To protect our rights and prevent fraud
PRIVACY.SHARING_LIST_4: With trusted service providers who assist in app operations (under strict confidentiality agreements)
PRIVACY.RIGHTS_TEXT_1: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
PRIVACY.RIGHTS_LIST_1_DESC: Request a copy of your personal data
PRIVACY.RIGHTS_LIST_3_DESC: Request deletion of your account and data
PRIVACY.RIGHTS_LIST_4_DESC: Export your data in a standard format
PRIVACY.COOKIES_TEXT_1: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
PRIVACY.COOKIES_TEXT_2: You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.
PRIVACY.CHILDREN_TEXT_1: Our application is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.
PRIVACY.CHANGES_TEXT_1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by:
PRIVACY.CHANGES_LIST_1: Posting the new Privacy Policy on this page
PRIVACY.CHANGES_LIST_3: Displaying a notice in the application
PRIVACY.CHANGES_TEXT_2: Your continued use of the application after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.
PRIVACY.CONTACT_TEXT_1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
PRIVACY.CONTACT_RESPONSE_TEXT: We aim to respond to all privacy-related inquiries within 48 hours.
PRIVACY.FOOTER_TEXT: This Privacy Policy is effective as of
